title: Dawncaster card-pack manifest (pack.json)
description: DawnKit.Packs manifest v1.2 — CARD-PACK-SPEC.md §2 + WEAPON-SPEC.md §2 (weapons/weaponPowers v1.1, startingCards v1.2). Field names map 1:1 onto the verified Card/Talent ScriptableObjects; enum values are the EXACT decompiled spellings including canonical typos (CardRariry values, suffix 'Phyisical'). This schema mirrors tools/validate_pack.py's ERROR-level rules; the validator remains the shipping gate (it also checks vocabulary, collisions vs the extracted pool, art files and budgets).

$schema.description: Editor pointer at this schema file (ignored by the loader).

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Optional; absent means 1. The loader refuses manifests newer than it supports with a player-visible message instead of guessing. Version 2 adds the events array (EVENT-SPEC.md §4) and is REQUIRED whenever events are present.

pack.description: Pack display name — unique across installed packs; spaces allowed (it names the in-game card-set row). The package DIR uses the collapsed no-space form (DC.<PascalCase>).

idBlock.description: [low, high] — the pack's reserved ID block inside the mod range 700,000,000-799,999,999 (blocks of 100; allocate in docs/ID-REGISTRY.md or derive via AutoId: 700,000,000 + (FNV1a32(lower(author + '/' + pack)) % 1,000,000) x 100). Every cardID/talentID must fall inside it. Also drives the pack's synthetic card-set value: 1000 + (low - 700,000,000) / 100.

cards.description: Regular cards (CARD-PACK-SPEC §2). IDs bottom-up from the block start.

weapons.description: Starting weapons (WEAPON-SPEC §2) — full card schema, category pinned to BasicAttack, plus 'classes'. IDs top-down from the block end.

weaponPowers.description: Activatable weapon powers (WEAPON-SPEC §2) — each becomes a tier-0 Talent. talentID is a SEPARATE namespace from cardIDs (a talentID may equal a cardID safely).

startingCards.description: Starting cards (WEAPON-SPEC §2, manifest v1.2) — full card schema (any legal card shape, no BasicAttack pinning) plus 'classes'. IDs continue the top-down loadout allocation below the weapons/powers.

events.description: Opportunity events (EVENT-SPEC.md §4, manifest v2) — Ink-scripted map encounters. Name-keyed (no numeric IDs; no idBlock needed for an events-only pack). Requires schemaVersion 2.

meta.description: Optional free-form pack-level notes (ignored by the loader).

name.description: Event identity: Dialogue.name, TextAsset.name AND the persistent doneEvents key. Must be unique (case-insensitive) vs shipped Dialogue assets, shipped dialogue TextAssets, and every other installed pack.

storyFile.description: Pack-relative path to the COMPILED Ink JSON (inkVersion 18-20; inklecate v1.0.0 emits 20). Commit the .ink source beside it; the loader reads only this file.

minLevel.description: Dialogue.minimumLevel — lowest areaLevel that can roll the event.

maxLevel.description: Dialogue.maxLevel — highest areaLevel that can roll the event; 0 = uncapped.

unique.description: Once picked, never offered again in that save (persisted into PlayerData.doneEvents by the event NAME).

condition.description: A ConditionChecker condition. Used both as a card playCondition (gates whether the card can be played) and as an effect condition (gates whether the effect fires).

value.description: ConditionValue member — what is being tested (exact decompiled spelling, all 118 members).

op.description: ConditionOperator member — how the value is compared.

target.description: Comparison operand as a string (e.g. a status name for StatusOnOpponent, '[[lastDamage]]:0' for AnyValue, a number for Chance). Grammar per GAME-MECHANICS Part VI/VII.

ignoreForDisplay.description: Hide this condition from the card's rendered text/glow.

effect.description: One triggered effect (Card CardEffectList entry / Talent effect).

trigger.description: GameTriggers member (exact decompiled spelling, all 113 — including canonical oddities like 'Playerdeath' and 'Gainsouls'). 'PlayAction' fires when the card is played; any other trigger makes the effect reactive, firing from wherever FindTriggeredEvents scans — confirm the trigger actually scans the zone you expect against a shipped card that does the same.

codeLine.description: Effect DSL line: ';'-separated 'command:arg:...' statements (e.g. 'damage:4:fire; draw:1'). Every command must exist in docs/research/reference/effect-commands.txt (565 commands, case-sensitive). Value tokens [[...]] per GAME-MECHANICS Part VI (e.g. [[lastDamage]], [[my(status)Burning]], /2 arithmetic). Apply statuses with 'inflict:X' / 'bless:X' PLUS referenceStatus — the idiom 441 shipped cards use; do NOT use the lookalike status-name-command form (1 card in the whole game).

forecast.description: Include this effect in the damage-forecast preview UI.

referenceStatus.description: Shipped StatusEffect asset name this effect applies/reads (wired to inflict/bless — the shipped idiom), or null. Resolved by name at load via AssetManager.GetStatus in phase 2; must be one of the 49 shipped statuses.

referenceCards.description: Card asset names for commands that reference cards (conjureref/delveref/...). Each must be a shipped card or a card in this pack. Ship [] when unused (list fields are non-null).

hideReferenceCards.description: Hide the referenced cards from the card's tooltip.

conditions.description: Conditions gating this effect (all must hold if the card sets requireAllConditions).

talentEffect.description: One triggered effect (Card CardEffectList entry / Talent effect).

trigger.description: GameTriggers member (exact decompiled spelling, all 113 — including canonical oddities like 'Playerdeath' and 'Gainsouls'). 'PlayAction' fires when the card is played; any other trigger makes the effect reactive, firing from wherever FindTriggeredEvents scans — confirm the trigger actually scans the zone you expect against a shipped card that does the same.

codeLine.description: Effect DSL line: ';'-separated 'command:arg:...' statements (e.g. 'damage:4:fire; draw:1'). Talent codeLines run TalentHandler.RunTalentEffect first and fall through to the full SpellEffects DSL — legal vocabulary is effect-commands.txt UNION talent-commands.txt (docs/research/reference/). Never put a cooldown-reducing command (resetweaponcooldown/lowercooldown/reducecooldown/setcooldown) inside an ActivateWeapon-triggered effect: infinite-activation loop. Value tokens [[...]] per GAME-MECHANICS Part VI (e.g. [[lastDamage]], [[my(status)Burning]], /2 arithmetic). Apply statuses with 'inflict:X' / 'bless:X' PLUS referenceStatus — the idiom 441 shipped cards use; do NOT use the lookalike status-name-command form (1 card in the whole game).

forecast.description: Include this effect in the damage-forecast preview UI.

referenceStatus.description: Shipped StatusEffect asset name this effect applies/reads (wired to inflict/bless — the shipped idiom), or null. Resolved by name at load via AssetManager.GetStatus in phase 2; must be one of the 49 shipped statuses.

referenceCards.description: Card asset names for commands that reference cards (conjureref/delveref/...). Each must be a shipped card or a card in this pack. Ship [] when unused (list fields are non-null).

hideReferenceCards.description: Hide the referenced cards from the card's tooltip.

conditions.description: Conditions gating this effect (all must hold if the card sets requireAllConditions).

enchantment.description: Enchantment payload, or null for a normal card (null becomes an empty Enchantment at load). Category 'Enchantment' cards carry their imbue behavior here.

text.description: Enchantment rules text shown while the enchantment is active.

combat.description: true = combat-scoped enchantment; false = persists outside combat.

showstacks.description: Show the stack counter on the enchantment icon.

effects.description: Triggered effects the enchantment contributes while active.

name.description: ScriptableObject name = EN display name. MUST be unique (case-insensitive) vs all 2,525 shipped cards and every other installed pack — card names are identity (lowercase-keyed caches); the loader refuses collisions with both claimants named.

cardID.description: Unique numeric card ID inside the pack's declared idBlock (mods own 700,000,000-799,999,999; shipped IDs top out at 41,020,045). Regular cards allocate bottom-up from the block start; starting weapons allocate top-down from the block end.

expansion.description: CardExpansions member. Use 'Extended' for mod packs: in-pool, but not Core (Core is the base-game identity). 'None' and 'Metaprogress' are excluded here — ProcessCard filters them out of the player pool. When the pack has a valid idBlock, the loader supersedes this with the pack's own synthetic set value (1000 + (blockStart - 700,000,000) / 100) so the pack appears as its own toggleable card set; the field stays required as documentation and as the fallback when synthetic sets are disabled.

type.description: CardType member. Drives type-matters conditions and resist/affinity interactions.

category.description: CardCategory member. 'Action' for normal plays; 'BasicAttack' is reserved for starting weapons and is pinned in the weapons array.

suffix.description: Suffix member — exact game spelling INCLUDING the canonical typo 'Phyisical' (sic: the game's enum member for physical; the enums are API surface, do not correct it in data). 'Companion' is excluded here: it routes the card to the companion deck, not the player pool (AssetManager.ProcessCard filter).

rarity.description: CardRariry member — sic: the game's enum type is literally misspelled 'CardRariry', and its values are API surface; data files use the exact game spellings, never 'fixed' ones. 'Monster' is excluded here because it is never legal for player cards (AssetManager.ProcessCard filter). Epic/Mythic/Ultra sit outside the reward ladder — reachable only by forced placement (GAME-MECHANICS Part VIII); the validator warns on them.

cost.description: Energy cost per pool; omitted keys = 0. 'Life' is paid in health, not energy. Cost profile IS frame-color identity (Card.GetColor: DEX green, INT blue, STR red, HOLY gold, hybrids aqua/orange/purple, life/corruption black) — keep archetype color identities coherent. Shipped pool max total energy cost is 4; distribution skews low (72% of cards cost 0-1).

Life.description: Health paid as a cost (black identity), not energy.

description.description: Card rules text (EN). Inline text IS the localization fallback for cards — no string tables needed.

keywords.description: CardProperties members — the game's mechanical keywords (Chain, OneUse, Piercing, Persistent, ...). Ship [] when unused (all list fields are non-null).

cardKeywords.description: Free-string tags, lowercase by convention (e.g. 'firecast'); reuse existing tags where possible — CardContainsKeyword-style conditions match on them.

utilityNumber.description: NumberParser grammar string (GAME-MECHANICS Part VII); empty when unused.

flags.description: Boolean Card fields expressed as a flag list (CARD-PACK-SPEC §2).

playConditions.description: Conditions that must hold for the card to be playable. Ship [] when unused.

effects.description: The card's triggered effects — at least one.

art.description: Path to the card art relative to the pack dir ('art/<CardName>.png', 512x512 RGBA full-bleed — the frame is drawn by the UI). Empty string = engine renders its generated cost-colored placeholder.

meta.description: Review-gate data for humans and the offline validator — stripped before load, never reaches the game. Required for the uniqueness gate (CARD-PACK-SPEC §5): a pack card earns its slot with a new decision, not new numbers.

archetype.description: Which archetype cluster this belongs to (GAME-MECHANICS Part VI).

nearestExisting.description: The closest shipped card ('Fireball' / 'Fireball.json'; annotations after ' (' allowed). Must resolve against the extracted pool — the nearest-neighbor audit anchor.

whyDifferent.description: The uniqueness argument: bridges archetypes / unused trigger+condition combo / new payoff or setup / new mode of an existing mechanic. '+1/-1 numbers on card X' gets cut.

intendedDeck.description: 2-3 lines of how it plays / what deck wants it.

powerNotes.description: Budget math vs the §4 baselines (~4 damage per energy at common; each rarity step buys ~+1 damage-equivalent or one rider).

weapon.description: One starting weapon (WEAPON-SPEC.md §2) — a weapon IS a card: the full card schema applies, category MUST be 'BasicAttack', and 'classes' lists the Professions that offer it at character creation.

name.description: ScriptableObject name = EN display name. MUST be unique (case-insensitive) vs all 2,525 shipped cards and every other installed pack — card names are identity (lowercase-keyed caches); the loader refuses collisions with both claimants named.

cardID.description: Unique numeric card ID inside the pack's declared idBlock (mods own 700,000,000-799,999,999; shipped IDs top out at 41,020,045). Regular cards allocate bottom-up from the block start; weapon cards allocate top-down from the block END (WEAPON-SPEC §3) so the two never meet.

expansion.description: CardExpansions member. Use 'Extended' for mod packs: in-pool, but not Core (Core is the base-game identity). 'None' and 'Metaprogress' are excluded here — ProcessCard filters them out of the player pool. When the pack has a valid idBlock, the loader supersedes this with the pack's own synthetic set value (1000 + (blockStart - 700,000,000) / 100) so the pack appears as its own toggleable card set; the field stays required as documentation and as the fallback when synthetic sets are disabled.

type.description: CardType member. Drives type-matters conditions and resist/affinity interactions.

category.description: Starting weapons MUST be 'BasicAttack' — the repeating basic-attack slot (WEAPON-SPEC §1: a starting weapon IS a BasicAttack card).

suffix.description: Suffix member — exact game spelling INCLUDING the canonical typo 'Phyisical' (sic: the game's enum member for physical; the enums are API surface, do not correct it in data). 'Companion' is excluded here: it routes the card to the companion deck, not the player pool (AssetManager.ProcessCard filter).

Epic/Mythic/Ultra sit outside the reward ladder — reachable only by forced placement (GAME-MECHANICS Part VIII); the validator warns on them.

intendedDeck.description: 2-3 lines of how it plays / what deck wants it.

powerNotes.description: Budget math vs the §4 baselines (~4 damage per energy at common; each rarity step buys ~+1 damage-equivalent or one rider).

classes.description: Which Professions offer this weapon at character creation (exact Profession asset names; 'all' allowed). The loader appends to the live Profession.weapons list.

startingCard.description: One starting card (WEAPON-SPEC.md §2, manifest v1.2) — a starting card IS a card: the full card schema applies with NO category pinning (the shipped 63-card starting corpus spans Action/Enchantment/Equipment), and 'classes' lists the Professions that offer it as the third character-creation loadout slot (weapon + weapon power + starting card). Starting cards are NORMAL pool cards — do not set excludeFromRewards (62/63 shipped starting cards are reward-pool legal); the pick enters the starting deck ×1 and round-trips inside playerDeck like any other card.

name.description: ScriptableObject name = EN display name. MUST be unique (case-insensitive) vs all 2,525 shipped cards and every other installed pack — card names are identity (lowercase-keyed caches); the loader refuses collisions with both claimants named.

cardID.description: Unique numeric card ID inside the pack's declared idBlock (mods own 700,000,000-799,999,999). Starting cards continue the block's top-down loadout allocation, directly below the pack's weapon cardIDs and power talentIDs (WEAPON-SPEC §3: one shared top-down counter per block); regular cards allocate bottom-up from the block start.

expansion.description: CardExpansions member. Use 'Extended' for mod packs: in-pool, but not Core (Core is the base-game identity). 'None' and 'Metaprogress' are excluded here — ProcessCard filters them out of the player pool. When the pack has a valid idBlock, the loader supersedes this with the pack's own synthetic set value (1000 + (blockStart - 700,000,000) / 100) so the pack appears as its own toggleable card set; the field stays required as documentation and as the fallback when synthetic sets are disabled.

'Companion' is excluded here: it routes the card to the companion deck, not the player pool (AssetManager.ProcessCard filter).

'Monster' is excluded here because it is never legal for player cards (AssetManager.ProcessCard filter). Epic/Mythic/Ultra sit outside the reward ladder — reachable only by forced placement (GAME-MECHANICS Part VIII); the validator warns on them.

Shipped pool max total energy cost is 4; distribution skews low (72% of cards cost 0-1).

intendedDeck.description: 2-3 lines of how it plays / what deck wants it.

powerNotes.description: Budget math vs the §4 baselines (~4 damage per energy at common; each rarity step buys ~+1 damage-equivalent or one rider).

classes.description: Which Professions offer this starting card at character creation (exact Profession asset names; 'all' allowed). The loader appends to the live Profession.startingCards list — CharacterBuilder.LoadStartingCards (phase 5) reads it live, no UI patching.

weaponPower.description: One activatable weapon power (WEAPON-SPEC.md §2) — becomes a tier-0 Talent. The button works only in exploration; ActivateWeapon payoffs are deck-prep/healing/statuses for the NEXT combat. Passive riders on other triggers carry the in-combat identity and must be budgeted as a permanent talent.

name.description: Talent SO name = display name (EN fallback). Unique (case-insensitive) vs all 383 shipped talents and sibling packs.

talentID.description: Talent.ID — a SEPARATE lookup space from cardIDs (shipped talent IDs max at 6,403,702). Mods reuse their card block's numbers, allocated top-down from the block end (WEAPON-SPEC §3).

flavortext.description: Flavor line under the rules text; empty when unused.

cooldown.description: Combats between uses — decrements by 1 after each combat victory with rewards. Runtime changes are floor-clamped to 1; derive the cooldown-vs-payoff curve from the 66 shipped tier-0 talents, do not guess (the validator warns above 9).

keywords.description: Talent keyword tags (free strings); [] when unused.

effects.description: Talent effects. Include exactly one ActivateWeapon-triggered effect (the button payoff — without it the power's button does nothing); optional passive riders on other triggers, like shipped weapon talents.

requirements.description: Stat gates for offering the power at character creation (Talent fields).

classes.description: Which Professions offer this power at character creation (exact Profession asset names; 'all' allowed).

art.description: powerImage PNG path relative to the pack dir, 512x512 (abilityart-sourced mutation); empty string = placeholder.

meta.description: Review-gate data for humans and the offline validator — stripped before load, never reaches the game. Required for the uniqueness gate (CARD-PACK-SPEC §5): a pack card earns its slot with a new decision, not new numbers.

archetype.description: Which archetype cluster this belongs to (GAME-MECHANICS Part VI).

nearestExisting.description: The closest shipped tier-0 talent (or card); must resolve against the extracted pool.

whyDifferent.description: The uniqueness argument: bridges archetypes / unused trigger+condition combo / new payoff or setup / new mode of an existing mechanic. '+1/-1 numbers on card X' gets cut.

intendedDeck.description: 2-3 lines of how it plays / what deck wants it.

powerNotes.description: Budget math vs the §4 baselines (~4 damage per energy at common; each rarity step buys ~+1 damage-equivalent or one rider).
